notes: Published leaderboard numbers are from the 2026-06-14 signed-off run, which applied severity as a pass-gate on 11 graded items. The harness was hardened afterward (severity moved to a soft metric; both judges' full verdicts + covered/violations + provider stored per row). Re-running under the corrected harness is pending OpenRouter credits (account hit 402 Payment Required). This file pins the model IDs because 'latest of each family' will go stale.
